column1: I just hopped on the resort site too to check it out quick, its $913 per person for this same set up
The quote you sent me is $779, so it it 913 or 779
I also read on the website you guys do price matches
I was saying, you mentioned the resort site being cheaper, so I went to check just to make sure
And for this same arrangement, the resort site is $913
Also, for the parties, it's an extra $200? And are they themed? And if so, do you know the themes
Yea for the off resort events, there's a party pass add on. We have a $200 bundle for 3 events. But you can do anywhere from 1 event to 5 events depending on how many nights you want to go out
The party pass comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at venues like D'Cave, Hall of Fame, Mandala, Mandala Beach Club, La Vaquita, and a few more
Super dope experience, you have time to add it onto your package tho. You can add it up to 2 days before the trip
So you have time to decide
And are these experiences off site? And if so is it safe and how are we getting there
Yea these are off resort property. About a 5 min trolly ride, picks you up right in front of the hotel and drops you off right in the party center where all of the clubs are
The entire area is what is called the hotel zone, thats where the hotel and the party center is located. there will be thousands of other travelers and tourists around doing the same thing
Well also have our on site staff at the resort and at the feature nightclub of the night
hey did we want to move forward with the reservation?
okay awesome. were you able to get onto it?
Gotcha. Are we able to do the 4 night one
hey yea i'll make that right now and send it over
Thank you. Let me know when you do
All good to go, can use the same link as before
Thanks. Regarding check in and checkout, are there certain times we are able to do so?
Yea so rooms are usually avail after 3. But if you arrive earlier you'll still be able to use the resort until rooms are ready. So you'll be able to eat drink, head to the pool, etc
For the party packages is that the only event going on at the hotel at the time or are there other things as well
so the party package is just the off resort events. On resort there is a ton of pool/beach parties hosted just about every day plus an on resort night club, all included in your base package
Hi! We booked! Why does it say I have a payment due today when I paid in full?
hey! looks like you added the booze cruise to your account which is the remaining balance
you have a little time to pay that off
I'm so confused the email I got says a different total than the actual amount paid. It says I have an overdue payment
Hey, what was the total in the email?
And it really should just be the $79 right
Yea that's what I saw on your account when I looked the other day
You're fine tho don't worry about it. I'll adjust the payment date
The email said that but my account says this:
yea Im gonna let our tech team know about it
hey can you have Grayson upload their flight info? that way we can finalize your airport transfers
she one the same flight as you?
word ill just add it in
hey heres the link to do so. Travel Insured handled all eligibility decisions and refund amounts https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
if you do want to cancel or anything after getting insurance, just let me know and I'll walk you through the steps
For the schedule you sent out is this for the on-resort events?
Thanks. Do you know anything about the on resort events? Also, in terms of our accounts, does everything look good? Ready to go?
Also, Natalie is telling me that her account says the trip is 779 when it is actually only 630. Can we get that figured out?
Also, I just paid for the booze cruise but it says on my account unpaid.
And was that for all 3 of us for just me?
Hey everyones all set at the moment. you add the booze cruise in for yourself so far
did Natalie and Grayson want theirs added in
Yes please. Are you able to do that?
yup just added. just need them to pay the balance off soon as possible today
hey did y'all wanna add any party pass tickets to your packages?
We are discussing right now. Are a lot of people doing that?
yea for sure. the resort is cool but can def get quiet at night sometimes
Also, what day is the booze cruise?
the booze cruise dates are assigned once you arrive on the resort for check in! based on whats available each day
hey hey safe travels today. gonna be a lit week
Hi! What time is our shuttle tomorrow to the airport? Do you know
Hey hey, run down to the Go Blue hospitality desk and they'll give you your shuttle time
Okay word yea it's gonna be a pretty early shuttle but just slide down to ge the exact time sometime through the day today
